items.description: AAP credential types configuration
AAP credentials configuration
Credential validation tasks
Main tasks entry point — includes security, nginx, ssl, sites task files in order
items.notes: tasks/main.yml written as part of recipes/default.rb conversion. Recurring R301 lint warning on include_tasks file: syntax is a known false positive — file was written successfully.

items.description: Role metadata converted from metadata.rb
items.notes: Generated from metadata.rb. namespace: x2a, Ubuntu focal/jammy, min_ansible_version: 2.9.

items.description: Handlers for nginx reload/restart and fail2ban restart, ssh restart
items.notes: Handlers: Reload nginx, Restart nginx, Restart fail2ban, Restart ssh (OS-conditional), Reload sysctl.

items.description: Default variables for the role (sites list, security flags, SSL settings)
items.notes: No AAP Private Hub collections required; all tasks use ansible.builtin modules only.

items.description: Chef attributes converted to Ansible variables — sites list, security SSH flags, SSL subject fields
items.notes: Converted Chef attributes to Ansible defaults. Nested Chef hash flattened to nginx_sites dict, ssl paths, and security booleans. Added nginx_user OS-conditional.

items.description: Entry point recipe — converted to main tasks file that imports security, nginx, ssl, sites task files in order
items.notes: Converted include_recipe calls to ansible.builtin.include_tasks. Recurring R301 lint warning on include_tasks file: syntax is a known false positive — file was written successfully.

items.description: Nginx recipe — installs nginx, deploys nginx.conf and security.conf, manages service, creates document roots and deploys static index files
items.notes: Converted nginx install, config deploy, service management, and document root/file tasks. Uses nginx_user variable for OS compatibility.

items.description: Security recipe — installs fail2ban/ufw, deploys jail.local and sysctl hardening, configures UFW rules, hardens sshd_config
items.notes: Converted fail2ban, UFW, sysctl, and SSH hardening tasks. Used lineinfile instead of sed for idempotency.

items.description: SSL recipe — installs openssl/ca-certificates, creates ssl-cert group, creates SSL dirs, generates self-signed certs for all 3 sites (idempotent)
items.notes: Converted SSL cert generation using openssl shell command with creates: for idempotency. ssl-cert group management included.

items.description: Sites recipe — deploys per-site nginx vhost configs from site.conf.erb, creates sites-enabled symlinks, removes default site
items.notes: Converted site template deployment with task-level vars, symlink creation, and default site removal.

items.description: fail2ban jail configuration — 5 jails: DEFAULT, sshd, nginx-http-auth, nginx-limit-req, nginx-botsearch
items.notes: Converted ERB template to Jinja2. No ERB variables present; static fail2ban jail configuration.

items.description: Global nginx configuration — worker settings, gzip, logging, includes conf.d and sites-enabled
items.notes: Converted ERB template to Jinja2. Static nginx main configuration.

items.description: Nginx security snippet — server_tokens off, rate limiting zones, buffer limits, SSL global settings
items.notes: Converted ERB template to Jinja2. Static nginx security snippet.

items.description: Per-site nginx vhost template — HTTP→HTTPS redirect, SSL/TLS, HSTS, security headers, gzip; rendered 3× for test/ci/status sites
items.notes: Converted ERB template to Jinja2. Variables: server_name, document_root, ssl_enabled, cert_file, key_file passed via task-level vars.

items.description: Static HTML landing page for test.cluster.local — deployed to /opt/server/test/index.html (owner: www-data, mode: 0644)
items.notes: Copied verbatim from Chef cookbook files/default/test/index.html.

items.description: Kernel sysctl hardening parameters — IP spoofing, ICMP, IPv6 disable, TCP SYN flood protection
items.notes: Converted ERB template to Jinja2. Static sysctl kernel hardening parameters.

items.description: Static HTML landing page for ci.cluster.local — deployed to /opt/server/ci/index.html (owner: www-data, mode: 0644)
items.notes: Copied verbatim from Chef cookbook files/default/ci/index.html.

items.description: Static HTML landing page for status.cluster.local — deployed to /opt/server/status/index.html (owner: www-data, mode: 0644)
items.notes: Copied verbatim from Chef cookbook files/default/status/index.html.

items.description: Molecule scenario configuration — delegated driver, local connection, no docker/podman
items.notes: Created by MoleculeAgent (deterministic scaffold)

items.description: Converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (nginx configs, SSL dirs, document roots, fail2ban config, sysctl config)
items.notes: Converge play builds full /tmp/molecule_test/ filesystem: nginx configs, site configs, symlinks, document roots, SSL placeholders, fail2ban, sysctl, sshd_config. No become, no Docker, no include_role.

items.description: Verify playbook — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths for nginx configs, vhost symlinks, SSL certs/keys, static files, fail2ban jail.local, sysctl config
items.notes: Verify play covers 9 sections: nginx global configs, sites-available (3 sites), sites-enabled symlinks (3 sites + default absent), document roots + index.html content, SSL certs + keys, fail2ban jail.local, sysctl 99-security.conf, sshd_config. Service/port/HTTP checks tagged molecule-notest.
